plugin.name: Quick CRUD Plugin
plugin.author: Dan Hoover
plugin.description: This plugin is for backend use only and provides automatic tables with basic CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) functionality. It is just for quick and dirty use on the backend when it doesn't make sense to code a full page for each feature. Thanks to user Zoza it also includes a direct database editor with a searchable table picker. Admins can edit any table in their database from the plugin settings page, and the editor can now also be included on your own admin pages - see the instructions on the settings page.
